name: Dairy Beef Casserole
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Medium Noodles, Cooked and Drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the hamburger in the butter.
2. Add the onions and garlic to the skillet. Stir until softened.
3. Pour in the tomato sauce and add salt and pepper. Stir to combine.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together sour cream, cottage cheese, carrots, and shredded cheddar cheese.
5. Layer the meat mixture alternately with cooked noodles in a 3-quart casserole dish, starting and ending with the noodle layer.
6. Top with additional shredded cheddar cheese.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F for at least 45 minutes, or until heated through and bubbly. Serve hot.
